name: CRUD Gudang/Lokasi - Tambah, Edit, Hapus
description: Test CRUD gudang: tambah gudang baru, edit, hapus. Login admin dulu.

planSteps.description: Navigate to /login, fill email admin@inventory.com and password password, click login
Fill nama with 'Gudang Test CRUD', kode with 'GDG-TEST', alamat with 'Jl. Gudang Test No.1', then click Simpan
Click Ubah button on 'Gudang Test CRUD' row
Edit modal opens with current data
Change name to 'Gudang Test Updated' and click Simpan
Name updated to Gudang Test Updated
Click Hapus on Gudang Test Updated row
Gudang Test Updated removed from table
